[{"Name":"Alvin W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITVFQ3AHW1VFrfeHL86XRBeMjTDbqc6aukogk-AUph8fXq-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted 5 roofing contractors in need of a roofing repair. 3 didn’t show up when I had scheduled a time for them to inspect my roof and the last 2 didn’t give me a vibe, they had my best interest. My options were getting thin until I found Mubeen the owner of Lakeside Roofing INC.

It was such a pleasure working with Mubeen and his team. I had a lot of questions throughout the roofing repair and Mubeen was extremely patient answering all my questions. As a long distance real estate investor communication is extremely important. I have no problem getting hold of Mubeen and this is extremely reassuring. He’s very passionate about educating his clients about roofing maintenance. After the roof was repaired, I continued using Mubeen's service to help me install new eavestrough and gutter guards.

It’s impressive how we have never met each other physically, everything is all done by telephone and pictures. I have never set foot once on my property to see him and his team repair my roof because he gave me enough confidence to trust him and also he had my best interest.

Check out the before and after photos I posted below. Solid work, genuine individual and excellent customer service. Highly recommend him and I look forward to meet you in person the next time I visit Windsor.

Thanks Mubeen!

Alvin","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqz57_Yw&fid=0x0:0xf11b61e82f18ee76"],"When":"2021-7-19"},{"Name":"LCDH Windsor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmhicfAzpXKQc-B3Es2Lk05hQQ1A_TgU_6lMAqbZlUMamYLKMP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great company. I phoned 6-7 other companies before them and they either didn’t show up when they said they would or turned down the job altogether due to scheduling. Elite was professional, punctual and left my house tidy. Great service, highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDunNfa3gE&fid=0x0:0x302a79082083e2f7"],"When":"2022-8-15"},{"Name":"L B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWJjgWMYzHQ1zNX_3iaHwMXxdBa-ZPSmsQyRQsBigykdHRRq6E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very responsive to initial inquiry and was available to come to our home for a quote right away (they printed up our quote on site in real time which was also nice). We got 6 quotes total from all the top-rated roofing companies in the Windsor-Essex area, and Elite was the best priced for the products and services we wanted. We went with high quality Landmark Pro shingles and a full synthetic underlay (some other quotes for the same products were upwards of $6500 more). Once our contract was signed the crew began within two weeks, and they were done in two days. We were very impressed with their efficiency, as we have quite a large roof! The crew was professional and personable and very kind. Our only concern was the quote included a metal detection sweep for nails in the yard, and I asked for a second sweep, as I was concerned for our dog. The following day, we did our own sweep and found almost 100 nails and some type of exacto blade in our backyard. I'm very happy we did our own sweep, and understand that there is always going to be the risk of missing some. Overall, the work was done efficiently and the crew was great. Thank you Elite roofing, we will definitely recommend your services in future!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mimma Colombe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLc6EYfOjvvLfjBsHbAltYhde67npXOA17hh2lKvhNH930KSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Elite roofing crew was Fantastic!  They did a great job on the roof install and cleaned up so well you wouldn’t know they were here - professional, thorough, and respectful of property.
This is the second home we’ve hired this company for and recommend them very highly.  The owner Dan was great to work with and we will definitely be using them again.","Images":null,"When":""}]

He does great work !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicky Angel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPI3UlSro0dqpXtJm7W55jB6EzIFlGwJVb6Dxx1rgvRLmKyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found this company on Kijijji. I had no experience or reference to this company. I called Shawn the owner and he was very cordial and respectful. I needed two windows recapped as air was coming through into the bedroom.  He (smartly) dropped by to look at what I needed done. He then told me he would call tomorrow with a price and date to do the work and he did. He took the old 30Y caulking off (not an easy job at least to me) in a meticulous fashion. He got every single bit of it. He then removed capping and removed caulking right down to the brick perfectly. Then he perfectly scrapped any traces off the vinyl window frames some visible and some not. He cleaned the area very well before caulking so that it would adhere properly. He used excellent quality caulking. I watched all of this. Not an easy job. After weeks of pressure they did my roof - a complete tear off and re-flash - in the first week of NOVEMBER.

They left a bathroom exhaust hanging in my attic with NO vent on the roof until I pointed it out as they were leaving.  They left areas of old step flashing exposed and skipped the counter flashing saying that it wasn't included in the quote.

Next, they tried to add a thousand dollars to a firm quote claiming tax wasn't included in the original quote.  Weeks later several shingles blew off the roof, and when they returned to repair it many long roofing nails were left scattered around my asphalt roof!

To add bad to worse, the first big rain drove water into a spot that they DID counter flash because it wasn't done right.  After decades of a dry home, I had water literally flowing into my mudroom because of the work of this company.

Debris was not just thrown down on tarps but was carried to front of roof and disposed of in boom bins and large trailer. Andrew thank you so much for your expertise, patience, and your very high quality workmanship. Your crew, Ali, Wayne, Wee man, Tyler and Donny are all amazing at their craft and an absolute pleasure to interact with. Vanessa you are a sweet heart and your commication during this process was very much appreciated. Warren, you have and top notch company and your employees are in my opinion are the best in thier field.

Margie and Ken","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXoks9K7_tsv_VTGm3kweQ&fid=0x0:0x4278892a5239967c"],"When":"2025-9-9"},{"Name":"Perry Isidore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIS_JR0bXwG2vYtVFsLKG3jRQ-YLp0jm18HvP3gHez1lDznQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From inception, I have been impressed with the excellent service of this company. Venessa was invaluable, considering the short notice to get the job done. Her communication was clear, and I promptly got a quote from her with the price range of the job and a time frame for when they would complete the job. Shortly after, I got a call from Warren, who explained some of the complications of the job and explained, in painstaking detail, the nuisances of having the job completed. I was slightly overwhelmed during the call, but his assurance that the job could be completed eased my anxiety. On the day of the job, Warren arrived with Tyler. I must admit I was impressed by the professionalism displayed by both Warren and Tyler, who took the time to show me what the job involved. They were very relatable and easy to communicate with. They initially quoted me to remove the stack below the roofline and the patch thereafter. However, they went above and beyond removing the entire stack (only a few blocks). I assisted, of course. However, gestures like these show how invaluable companies like A+ Roofing are. I would highly recommend this company regardless of the size of the job, from small patches like mine to whole replacements or new roofs. They were very clean and made sure the job site was picked up every night before they left. They kept us informed throughout the whole process and explained everything they were doing. Later in the day I received the quote and asked when he could complete the work.  He knew I was stressed out and said he would be there the following day (today) at 11:00 am.

title: Bright Green Roof Windsor
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"eva bieszk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEcURuytPAtZYAsmbHbtfs24XzzO5LuRiw8zudKL_ixDU7j5md=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bright Green Roof came today for the restoration of my roof.   I was interested in this to help maintain the integrity of my roof.
Very polite and pleasant young men came on time even in this heat! Three to be precise.  All fellas were great!
The job was done efficiently.  They sealed all vents and checked for fungal growth.  They hosed down the walls and managed to get rid of some bird deposits.
Very agreeable to my suggestion to cover the ponds.
My roof now looks like new.
I'd definitely recommend this company to anyone interested in having this process done for the longevity of your roof.  They will come by first and explain their product.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynne Klinck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOMBOfyJlNRfcmsoGP67TOFGV0GbAAHRkp3wsp6lrg7A70hQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Steve and his crew arrived yesterday to spray my house and detached garage roofs.  They were punctual, polite and efficient.  After my roofs were treated, Steve told me they'd found a few slipped shingles, which they'd repaired.  He also said they caulked the roof vents. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Pat Lepera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPSSWm2iWCQVjICIknSS2czLNXsc8l6j58NaOwUvgqsP-RAxM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was given notice from my insurance company that my roof was 20 years old and needed to be replaced, otherwise they would no longer insure my home.

I called Roofcraft and Doug came out to see me. He climbed on the roof and instantly explained that my roof was not 20 years old due to the shingle wear and tear. He told me he would put something together for me to send to the insurance company, which he sent the following day.

He was able to prove my roof was not 20 years old using Google Images and by pointing out the different types of shingles used.

With the evidence he provided, I was able to send the report to  my insurance company to rescind their notice and continue my coverage.

Doug could have taken advantage of the fact that I was told I needed a new roof, but the honesty and integrity he showed were unmatched.

After a tree crashed through our house damaging much of the exterior we needed a siding contractor who could start the job quickly to seal up the house as the winter was approaching. Aaron was very quick to provide an excellent quote and very attentive to our questions. He responded quickly to all of our questions and even did a little preliminary work to seal the old siding around a new window that we had installed. Everything was great until we gave him a deposit for the materials. Suddenly he was not as responsive and not truthful regarding placing the order for the materials. We were told by Aaron that he had placed the order with a local distributor. One day as we drove past this business we stopped in to get a colour sample to match some exterior paint. We were told that they had not placed the order but they had provided a quote for the materials and were waiting for a deposit from Aaron. This was the second time that this distributor had told us this after Aaron had assured us that they were mistaken and he did not require a deposit to order the materials. The company pulled up the order and the emails that were sent between them and Aaron asking for the deposit. They confirmed that they had spoken to Aaron the morning of our visit to the store. At this point we figured that we were getting the run around and that we had chosen the wrong contractor. I immediately called, texted and emailed Aaron to tell him that we were canceling the job because of this and that the job would not be done before the winter now due to lead times of the materials. All of my communication attempts were not returned . I called the WPD at this point I received a text from Aaron stating that he was advised by his lawyer that he did not need to return the deposit as he had placed the order for the materials and he had not missed the date agreed to in the contract. This is not true he did not purchase the materials or he would have called us to say everything is on track when he received the emails and texts from us cancelling the job. This has been a nightmare for us and we are out of pocket thousands of dollars. We found another contractor to do the work and we are very happy with their work. It’s a huge relief knowing the valve was replaced properly. Highly recommend Alex if you’re looking for a reliable and skilled plumber!
Thank You
Abby and David","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dom cervi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKScReJTgsG1oFiJaNzULw7fq64uNf0YOIQo3-HavMLwOyIBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"had been waiting for some time just to have the seal in my toilet replaced to stop it from constantly running. I received a message from the management company with an approximate timeframe of 10:00–10:30 AM for the plumbers to arrive.

I heard a knock at the door while I was upstairs on the other side of the house. I didn’t know for certain it was the plumbers, but I assumed it likely was, so I started putting my dogs into their crates so they wouldn’t be in the way before answering the door. It took me about a minute or so to get them secured before heading downstairs.

To my surprise, when I came downstairs I found two people already inside my house. I had never opened the door and never invited anyone in.

At that moment I had no idea who they were or why they were there. There was nothing identifying who they were or what company they worked for, so from my perspective it looked like two strangers had entered my home without permission. It wasn’t until one of them spoke and identified himself that I realized they were the plumbers.

I immediately asked him, “Is it normal practice for you to just walk into someone’s house?” and told him very clearly that what he did was extremely unprofessional. Entering someone’s home without permission is completely unacceptable.

His response was that he “didn’t think I heard the knocking,” and when I pressed the issue further his exact response was:
“Well if you want, I can leave and you can get the seal fixed later, or I’m here now.”

That response completely missed the point. The issue wasn’t whether the repair would get done — the issue was that two strangers had already walked into my home without permission.

I’ll be honest — if he hadn’t immediately spoken up and identified himself, that situation could have gone very badly. When someone unexpectedly finds unknown people inside their home, their first instinct is to protect their home and family. Situations like that can escalate very quickly, which is exactly why you never enter someone’s house without being invited in.

Despite the situation, I told him fine, go ahead and replace the seal since I had already been waiting a long time to have it fixed.

I also want to point out that I have two large German Shepherds, which is exactly why I was taking a moment to secure them before answering the door. If those dogs had been loose and someone decided to walk into my house uninvited, the situation could have turned out very differently.

After finishing the job there was no communication at all. They didn’t say a word, simply walked out of my house, slammed their truck doors, and sped out of my driveway like they were upset for being called out.

The entire interaction showed a complete lack of professionalism, basic respect, and common sense.

I want to make it clear that this review is not about the company name itself — it’s about the people representing it. When employees behave like this inside a customer’s home, it raises serious questions about the standards the company allows under its name and the level of professionalism customers can expect","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dory Mills","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaj8YlPqo926gTRjl8FAEx6JhqnNBPpqGxWM8qry1Mg-jAJaZJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alex and Dan were timely, efficient, friendly and professional. They did come that day and were able to repair the damaged area. I want to thank you for your professionalism and prompt to our problem.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dee D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqWGY217IWXyFtcRrS2pRinLS1RUDfMzyet8iea3ElrZSblA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My house had major damage from a storm. Restoration company hired a roofing company to come in and "fix it". They redid drywall, mud and tape and it was still leaking. Along comes the Gods and redid our roof and it's been absolutely perfect. This company killed it, cleaned up and left my yard cleaner than it was. Roofing Gods are excellent 👏  thank you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha PT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULz9qqO6v34job1KcyH8Mjr4rNY31UDzDi9yywmlGGmlQr-YZjyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Edit again:

#1 - I was never irate.
#2 - I didn't delete anything from Facebook.
#3 - I asked you if you had any photos from the repair that was done and you flat out told me NO.
#4 - I never said you were responsible for the original workmanship of my roof.  What you are responsible for is the repair I paid $800 to fix that wasn't fixed.     Which come to think of it.     You didn't do the repair, you sent someone else to do it. And you haven't been on my roof since, so. You have ZERO idea if the repair was done correctly and at NO TIME did you acknowledge that.

I am absolutely going to question the character of a person that cannot take responsibility for their work.    I had someone come and Re do your work and guess what, NO LEAK.  it had nothing to do with the valley.

Edit:

Since this situation occurred, I have had TWO roofers take a look at my chimney.    BOTH roofers said the previous job was "not done well", "rushed" for the exact same reasons.  Both roofers said the job needed to be redone.  BOTH roofers said the job would cost $300 and SHOULD HAVE NEVER COST $800 to begin with.   The new roofers also pointed out to me that this company reused old shingled that had holes in them from previous nails.
I paid $800 and couldn't even get $20 in new shingles to do the job well?

I would like to first state that my review was originally 5 stars.    I thought they did great work, clean, professional.

If I could give ZERO stars now, I would.
I have a leak in my ceiling.   I pointed out that I thought it was at the chimney. At not point was there any investigation, the professionals just took my amateur word for it.
They came, did some work.    Everything was fine. Paid $800 CASH

Then it started raining.   My ceiling started to leak again.

I reach out to Derrick late on a Sunday night via text message as I didn't want to forget.    I was NOT expecting a response.     He got back to me, told me what he believes the problem is and said he would get back to me to set something up.
Monday - no call or text.
Tuesday morning I call their main number found on google.  I leave a voice mail asking to speak with someone else besides Derrick because I would like to work with someone who takes me seriously, and as a customer I believe that is my right.   I recieve a phone call from Patrick, I begin to explain the situation to him and he IMMEDIATELY cuts me off stating they do not guarantee the workmanship of my roof - I would have NEVER thought or expected this as they didn't do the roof to begin with.   Patrick is extremely defensive, yelling at me. I am getting frustrated, he can hear it in my tone. He raises his voice and tells me to "stop yelling" at him.   I am not yelling.    In my frustration I do call him a scam artist because of his defensiveness and unwillingness to listen to the issue.    I do hang up on him.
He then begins texting me.  I block him.

Next, Derrick calls me.  I answer the phone very clamly. He is calling me a liar.    I have not lied.   He then tells me he planned to come to my house today - but never thought he should give me a heads up, and also it is raining outside so that seems like a lie.   He continues to yell at me and tell me that he provides great customer service.
I do hang up on him.

He then comments on a social media post I had wrote, stating that I am "weird" and a "liar" among other things.

This could have all been avoided if Patrick called me, let me explain the situation at hand and we scheduled a time for some one to come back out and look at the roof.  It didn't need to be all of this dramatics.
I am not a liar, I am not weird.  I am stressed out with a leaky roof that I thought I paid $800 to fix already.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOXsy-uvse_1IA&fid=0x0:0x216eec657d79c9ea"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Shelley St. Julian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwJDr8OemNAT90NN_sttG0DUT_kbazEEvu2SM36UXWqblvKA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to get a new roof along with the eavestroughs with the built in gutter guards. Our roof looks amazing and the shingles are a high quality shingle that should last for many many years to come.  I happened to be out of town the 2 days that the work was being completed.  I like to be home when work is being done however when I returned the guys were just finishing up the job.  Once their cleanup was complete the yard was in better condition than before they even started the roof, lol.  They were very detail oriented and went through our entire property collecting every bit of debris and nails that may have been left behind.  I got to chat with the workers and they were all very nice, friendly and professional.  If you are considering a new roof give Roofing Gods a call don't fall for a low ball quote as you really do get the quality and workmanship you pay for. I would highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: ROSS Construction Inc
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Brad Cassidy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7sfuDON3e2dGf1CgV2ejblGlIz73uK7KABCBsnH8C0t-m_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Anyone who hires Ross Construction (Greg Stephen) is an idiot!  Trust me because i'm the biggest idiot of them all, I had this company do my roof, siding, windows, and porch this past summer.  The job was to take 10 days once it began and once it did begin it was four months that I had to put up with these so called workers here, most days just one guy showed up and other days none! I found a worker passed out in my yard with 8 cans of budwiser thrown about the yard, windows that were put in off center, damaged window coverings, and siding that would fall off before they returned the next day. I mentioned to Greg many times the problems I was having and he would do nothing, it got to a point where he would not return my phone calls at all. I should have not paid him for this job at all but i'm not the kind of person who does this.  I am now trying to get ahold of the owner Greg Stephen who again will not return my call, I have fasia that has fallen off my house, siding that has falling off that will not re-connect, drip edge that has blown away, and window flash that has falling down. When I first called Greg on this matter to my surprise he called me back right away, said how bad he felt and he's be out that day to assist and get the problem solved.  That was Dec 20th and he did not come out or has not returned my calls since. I think he only answered the first call because he thought maybe it was a job.  I also have major concerns over how he removed my asbestos siding from my home as well as my neighbours do and am in contact with environment canada over this issue, I have also contacted the building department of Windsor with respect to the porch he did that has all but totally falling down, all the railings have dislodged and I have been told by Canada Post to put my mailbox at the bottom of the stairs because their workers will not step in this porch saying its unsafe.  I am told there should have been a permit but I don't think they got one.  Sorry to go on and on but they have messed up so much on my house I don't want others to go thru what I have. Thx for reading.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Lucas Romeo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFikEu9hoAvy2FvmHACazl_x4v1DqCd5dGL9xXpQNL5hVUjm2m=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a negative \u0026 disappointing experience with Jan at Maximum Roofing. After two visits to my home, Jan and his unqualified trainees refused to come back a 3rd time to fix my issue. Jan took nearly $400 of my money and never came back to the house to permanently fix the leak. He told me if he was going to come to the house, that he would only do so if he was changing the whole roof (most likely a job over $4,000 when the roof was essentially new). Why would anyone give someone a job to change an entire roof when they can't even fix a basic leak? After calling a reputable company in the area, they had seen the work that Jan had done in an attempt to fix the issue and said that the attempt was sloppy and lacking craftmanship. They explained to me the steps that should've been taken that weren't. I blame myself because Jan came through a referral from someone that I didn't know, and there were no reviews on Google, other than the ones on his website which lets be honest, those testimonials could be easily forged by him. When seeking a contractor, I highly recommend a company that has at least a 4 star rating, and 100 reviews.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELzmpY-yuLyicg\u0026fid=0x0:0xc8b5ba0883926018"],"When":"2025-5-7"}]
